title: Hymenachne condensata
taxonomy: Hymenachne condensata is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. More specifically, it is classified under the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Paniceae. The genus Hymenachne is a group of grasses native to South America, with H. condensata being one of the species found in this region. This classification places H. condensata within the larger group of grasses, which are known for their adaptation to various environments. Further study on this plant may reveal more specific characteristics that contribute to its classification within the Poaceae family.
